group.name: Always installed - toggle each in the MCM under Features

plugin.name: Elemental Resistance Uncap
plugin.description:
Removes the 75% elemental resistance cap (fPlayerMaxResistance raised to 10000). Fire, frost, shock, magic, and poison resistances now scale to 100% and beyond. At exactly 100% you are immune to that element.
Note: this setting is global, so highly resistant ENEMIES also gain true immunity to their own element - bring a second damage type.
Default: ON. Toggle at runtime in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Elemental Absorb
plugin.description:
When your resistance to an element exceeds 100%, incoming damage of that type heals you instead: 1% of the damage per point over 100, reaching a full 100% heal at 200% resistance.
Covers hostile spells, weapon enchantments, drains (resisted by Magic Resist), and poisons - each magic effect is checked against the resistance that actually governs it. Only health-damaging effects count, so riders like frost slow cannot inflate the heal.
Applies to you and your current followers. Default: ON.

plugin.name: Physical DR Past 75%
plugin.description:
MASTERY PERK: the armor damage-reduction cap stays at the engine value (75%) for the world, but you and your followers keep scaling above it — gated by your armor mastery. Your reachable ceiling grows with mastery level; 99% DR requires BOTH near-maximum armor rating (target auto-calibrated from your load order's best gear, MCM-tunable) AND full mastery of the worn armor type.
The curve below the engine cap is completely unchanged. Enemies never benefit. The armor UI still displays the engine cap - see MCM > Features > Live Status for your real DR.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

group.name: Always installed - toggle each in the MCM under Features

plugin.name: Vendor Gold Doubled
plugin.description:
All 13 vendor gold pools (general goods, blacksmiths, apothecaries, inns, spell vendors, street vendors, and all five fence tiers) carry double the gold. MRO.dll doubles the leveled lists in memory at every game load, so it adapts to any load order automatically.
Applied by the native plugin; cannot be toggled at runtime.

plugin.name: Carry Weight +150
plugin.description:
You and your followers receive a permanent +150 carry weight ability. Enough to haul a full potion stock and loot without constant inventory management.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Arrow Recovery 66%
plugin.description:
Arrows recovered from bodies at 66% instead of the vanilla 33%. Archery ammunition stays affordable without being infinite.
Default: ON. Toggle in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Faster Cell Reset (off by default)
plugin.description:
Optional: speeds cell respawn to restock shops and repopulate dungeons faster than Requiem's long timers.
DEFAULT OFF, and left off is recommended. Respawn in Skyrim is all-or-nothing: turning this on also returns display and quest items to cells and can revert one-time activators (for example, Blackreach lifts). Only enable it if you accept that trade-off.
Toggle in MCM > Features.

plugin.name: Enable Mastery System (recommended)
plugin.description:
14 mastery skills tracked via Custom Skills Framework. Each unlocks when its base skill reaches 100 and advances through real use, on a leveling curve extended past 100 (weapons and magic use a steeper endgame curve, so the top levels cost far more than the first).
How each trains: weapons by damage dealt, normalized per hit (overkill on weak enemies earns nothing, and 1H/2H train at parity); magic by magicka spent per cast (bigger spells train more; the schools that require combat still do); armor by combat time in a matching chest piece; crafting and Speech by sessions.
Bonuses at full mastery: - One-Handed / Two-Handed / Archery: +50% attack damage - Evasion / Heavy Armor: +300 armor rating while wearing a matching chest piece; also gates the 99% DR Mastery Perk - Destruction / Restoration / Alteration / Conjuration / Illusion: +50 effective skill - Smithing / Alchemy / Enchanting: +25% crafting potency, and Smithing mastery raises temper caps up to 2x - Speech: buy up to 20% cheaper, sell up to 25% higher
Mastery cap is adjustable in the MCM (50-200; default 100). Higher caps mean a longer grind to the same maximum bonus. Requires Custom Skills Framework.

plugin.name: Disable Mastery System
plugin.description: No Custom Skills Framework files installed - the 14 mastery skills never appear and no mastery bonuses apply. Every other MRO feature remains active. You can NOT enable mastery later without reinstalling.

plugin.name: Install rebalanced Experience.ini
plugin.description:
Rebalanced XP weights for the Experience mod: more XP from kills (especially groups and above-level enemies), dungeon clears, and quest milestones; less from map discovery. Total leveling speed matches the Faster Leveling preset.
Only choose this if Experience.esp is in your load order. It overwrites your current SKSE/Plugins/Experience.ini.

plugin.name: Skip (keep existing settings)
plugin.description: No Experience.ini installed; your current XP settings are untouched. Choose this if you do not use the Experience mod or prefer your existing tuning.
